ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., RandomForestClassifier) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters for the algorithm */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library or framework used for the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters used for the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment or hardware used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters for the specific version */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was trained */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model version */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment or hardware used for training the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model version */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "train_score" REAL /* Train score of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "recall_score" REAL /* Recall score of the model */,
  "precision_score" REAL /* Precision score of the model */,
  "roc_auc_score" REAL /* ROC AUC score of the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix of the model */,
  "cross_validation_scores" TEXT /* Cross-validation scores of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm type */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the algorithm type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_types_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset type */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_types_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters for the specific version */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was trained */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken to train the model version */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* Environment or hardware used for training the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_version_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset version */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset version */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset version in bytes */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset version is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset version */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset version */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset version in bytes */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset version is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_version_history_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
